gates.name: provenance_exact_match
gates.detail: Provenance QA must pass with zero unmatched and zero OCR-only lines.

gates.name: provenance_trace_integrity
gates.detail: Every markdown trace row maps to a catalog line_id.

gates.name: forbidden_class_leakage
gates.detail: No forbidden class lines are present in rendered output.

gates.name: ocr_primary_policy
gates.detail: OCR-backed lines are blocked unless --allow-ocr-primary is enabled.

gates.name: ocr_marker_absent
gates.detail: Final markdown must not include OCR marker blocks.

gates.name: section_disposition_complete
gates.detail: All canonical sections must have a disposition in section-map.

gates.name: manual_checklist_complete
gates.detail: Review notes checklist and placeholders must be completed.

gates.name: markdown_trace_sync
gates.detail: Rendered trace must exactly match markdown and all content bullets must be traced.

gates.name: section_completeness
gates.detail: Every selected line for each mapped section must be accounted for in render output.

gates.name: executive_summary_cleanup
gates.detail: Executive Summary must not include engagement-letter/legal boilerplate text.

gates.name: cleanup_quality
gates.detail: Final markdown must not contain fragment/noise bullets after cleanup.
